creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text: This is a feature request, not a bug. I'm developing a custom appliance at work, and to make life easier on our installation techs, we'll be bundling certain core packages with the installation media. We're going to write a bsdinstall script that will allow the installers to select which packages from the installation media they want to install then bsdinstall will install them. A patch will be provided once the work is done.
